MusicPlayer.CurrentAudioTitle: Main Menu- Stars at our backs

LuaScript:
-- Monster Hunter World: The Board Game
-- Game Design and Development By Jamie Perkins
-- Published by Steamforged Games
-- Tabletop Simulator Table Design & Scripting by VenomizedStar and GeckoTH



TimeCardZoneGUID = "d91b59" 
TCardBagGUID = "c6276d"
TCardBagGUID_IB = "0aa0b1"
ElementalDeckGUID = "8e6c5f"
ElementalDeckGUID_IB = "44c9d5"
ECardZoneGUID = "ff2307"
TrackGUID = "aed8de"
TrackGUID_IB = "02d558"
TrackPos = {22.56,1.50,-9.50}
TimeCardNeed = {
  ['Great Jagras'] = {35,30,30,30,30},
  ['Barroth'] = {35,30,30,30,30},
  ['Rathalos'] = {40,40,45,45,45},
  ['Pukei-Pukei'] = {35,35,35,35,35},
  ['Jyuratodus'] = {35,35,35,35,35},
  ['Diablos'] = {40,40,45,45,45},
  ['Black Diablos'] = {40,40,45,45,45},
  ['Teostra'] = {40,40,45,45,45},
  ['Nergigante'] = {40,40,45,45,45},
  ['Kulu-Ya-Ku'] = {35,35,35,35,35},
  ['Kushala Daora'] = {40,40,45,45,45},
  ['Tobi-Kadachi'] = {35,35,35,35,35},
  ['Anjanath'] = {35,35,35,35,35},
  ['Azure Rathalos'] = {40,40,45,45,45},
  ['Barioth'] = {40,40,40,40,40},
  ['Rajang'] = {40,40,40,40,40},
  ['Tzitzi-Ya-Ku'] = {35,35,35,35,35},
  ['Great Girros'] = {40,40,40,40,40},
  ['Radobaan'] = {35,35,35,35,35},
  ['Kirin'] = {40,40,45,45,45},}

-----------------------------------------------------------------
function onLoad()
-- Forge for Free toggle
  button_forgeForFree = getObjectFromGUID("dc822e")
  button_forgeForFree.interactable = true
  Global.setVar("forgeForFree", false)
  mark_forgeForFree_button_parms = {
      click_function = 'enable_forgeForFree',
      function_owner = nil,
      label = '',
      color = {0, 0, 0, 0.6},
      hover_color = {0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.6},
      position = {0,0.3,0},
      rotation = {0,0,0},
      width = 1200,
      height = 1200,
      tooltip = "",
  }
  unmark_forgeForFree_button_parms = {
      click_function = 'disable_forgeForFree',
      function_owner = nil,
      label = '✔',
      color = {0, 0, 0, 0.6},
      hover_color = {0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.6},
      position = {0,0.3,0},
      rotation = {0,0,0},
      width = 1200,
      height = 1200,
      font_size = 2500,
      font_color = {1,1,1},
      tooltip = "",
  }
  button_forgeForFree.createButton(mark_forgeForFree_button_parms)

	-- these functions enable and disable the forgeForFree checkbox
	function enable_forgeForFree()
	  button_forgeForFree.removeButton(0)
	  button_forgeForFree.createButton(unmark_forgeForFree_button_parms)
	  broadcastToAll("Forge for Free is ENABLED", {r=0, g=1, b=0})
	  Global.setVar("forgeForFree", true)
	end -- end enable_forgeForFree()
	function disable_forgeForFree()
	  button_forgeForFree.removeButton(0)
	  button_forgeForFree.createButton(mark_forgeForFree_button_parms)
	  broadcastToAll("Forge for Free is DISABLED", {r=1, g=0, b=0})
	  Global.setVar("forgeForFree", false)
	end -- end disable_forgeForFree()
end
--------------------------------------------------------------------------

function GetRewards(params)
    for token in string.gmatch(params[1], "[^%s]+") do
  name = token
  break
    end
    MonsterReward = Rewards[name]
    rid = tonumber(params[2])
    reward = MonsterReward[rid]
    return reward
end 


function PrepareFight(data)
	BossName = data[1]
	num = data[2]

	broadcastToAll("Loading Monster: " .. num .. "-Star " .. BossName)
	local boards = getObjectsWithTag("GameBoard")
	local gameBoard = boards[1]
	local currentState = gameBoard.getStateId()

	if gameBoard ~= nil then
		if BossName == "Tobi-Kadachi" or BossName == "Anjanath" or BossName == "Rathalos" then 
			if currentState ~= 1 then 
				gameBoard.setState(1)
			end
		elseif BossName == "Great Jagras" or BossName == "Azure Rathalos" then
			if currentState ~= 2 then 
				gameBoard.setState(2)
			end
		elseif BossName == "Barroth" or BossName == "Diablos" or BossName == "Black Diablos" then 
			if currentState ~= 3 then 
				gameBoard.setState(3)
			end
		elseif BossName == "Pukei-Pukei" or BossName == "Jyuratodus" or BossName == "Kulu-Ya-Ku" then 
			if currentState ~= 4 then 
				gameBoard.setState(4)
			end
    elseif BossName == "Tzitzi-Ya-Ku" then
      if currentState ~= 5 then 
        gameBoard.setState(5)
      end
    elseif BossName == "Kirin" then
      if currentState ~= 6 then 
        gameBoard.setState(6)
      end
    elseif BossName == "Great Girros" then
      if currentState ~= 7 then 
        gameBoard.setState(7)
      end
    elseif BossName == "Radobaan" then
      if currentState ~= 8 then 
        gameBoard.setState(8)
      end
    elseif BossName == "Teostra" or BossName == "Nergigante" then 
      if currentState ~= 9 then 
        gameBoard.setState(9)
      end
    elseif BossName == "Kushala Daora" then 
      if currentState ~= 10 then 
        gameBoard.setState(10)
      end
		else
		end
	end

	--place element
	EDeck = getObjectFromGUID(ElementalDeckGUID)
	ECardZone = getObjectFromGUID (ECardZoneGUID)
	EDeck.takeObject({smooth = false, position = ECardZone.getPosition(), callback_function = function(items) items.randomize() end})
	
	--place time card
	TCardBag = getObjectFromGUID(TCardBagGUID)
	TCardBag.takeObject({smooth = false, position = {-53,8,-24}, callback_function = function(items) ShuffleAndPlaceTimeCard(items,TimeCardNeed[BossName][num]) end})

	--place track 
	TrackBag = getObjectFromGUID(TrackGUID)
	TrackBag.takeObject({smooth = false, position = TrackPos})
end 

function ShuffleAndPlaceTimeCard(deck, nombre)
  
	deck.randomize()
	offset = 0.2
	TPos = getObjectFromGUID(TimeCardZoneGUID).getPosition()
	base = TPos[2]
	
	for var=1,nombre,1 do
  		deck.takeObject({smooth = false, position = {TPos[1],base,TPos[3]}})
		  base = base+offset
	end
	
	deck.destruct()
end 

function PrepareFight_IB(data)
	BossName = data[1]
	num = data[2]

	broadcastToAll("Loading Monster: " .. num .. "-Star " .. BossName)
	local boards = getObjectsWithTag("GameBoard")
	local gameBoard = boards[1]
	local currentState = gameBoard.getStateId()

	if gameBoard ~= nil then
		if currentState ~= 11 then 
				gameBoard.setState(11)
		end
	end

	--place element
	EDeck = getObjectFromGUID(ElementalDeckGUID_IB)
	ECardZone = getObjectFromGUID (ECardZoneGUID)
	EDeck.takeObject({smooth = false, position = ECardZone.getPosition(), callback_function = function(items) items.randomize() end})
	
	--place time card
	TCardBag = getObjectFromGUID(TCardBagGUID_IB)
	TCardBag.takeObject({smooth = false, position = {-53,8,-24}, callback_function = function(items) ShuffleAndPlaceTimeCard(items,TimeCardNeed[BossName][num]) end})

	--place track 
	TrackBag = getObjectFromGUID(TrackGUID_IB)
	TrackBag.takeObject({smooth = false, position = TrackPos})
end 

function ShuffleAndPlaceTimeCard_IB(deck, nombre)
  
	deck.randomize()
	offset = 0.2
	TPos = getObjectFromGUID(TimeCardZoneGUID).getPosition()
	base = TPos[2]
	
	for var=1,nombre,1 do
  		deck.takeObject({smooth = false, position = {TPos[1],base,TPos[3]}})
		  base = base+offset
	end
	
	deck.destruct()
end 

function SetHP(num)
hptoken = getObjectFromGUID("4a93e6")
hptoken.call("setHP", num)
end 

function split(data)

	pString = data[1]
	pPattern = data[2]
   local Table = {} 
   local fpat = "(.-)" .. pPattern
   local last_end = 1
   local s, e, cap = pString:find(fpat, 1)
   while s do
if s ~= 1 or cap ~= "" then
 table.insert(Table,cap)
end
last_end = e+1
s, e, cap = pString:find(fpat, last_end)
   end
   if last_end <= #pString then
cap = pString:sub(last_end)
table.insert(Table, cap)
   end
   return Table
end 

-----HUNTER TOKENS-----
function generateHunterTokens()
  
  local token5pos = {65.29, 0.8, -9.09}
  local token6pos = {65.29, 0.8, -7.25}
  local token7pos = {67.13, 0.8, -9.09}
  local token8pos = {67.13, 0.8, -7.25}
  local tokenRot = {0,90,0}
  local tokenScale = {3.3,3.3,3.3}
  local tokenMesh = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/2021593941273123907/DD3A800ACB0CE3B4BC9365A7AFB03A1214A20F90/"
  local token5params = {
    mesh = tokenMesh,
    collider = tokenMesh,
    diffuse = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/2041863856470088247/532F6BE3168525CEF1BCCC233EBC37F6371825BC/",
    material = 3
  }
  local token6params = {
    mesh = tokenMesh,
    collider = tokenMesh,
    diffuse = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/2041863856470088280/A6BE50206EA1B475D48DD1262688577ECC12A9D1/",
    material = 3
  }
  local token7params = {
    mesh = tokenMesh,
    collider = tokenMesh,
    diffuse = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/2041863856470088311/4A0CF42A4D67B9DE3BFA6F97922AAEA08577F7E2/",
    material = 3
  }
  local token8params = {
    mesh = tokenMesh,
    collider = tokenMesh,
    diffuse = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/2041863856470088338/F92892590E03194CB45B9B7C902A05CBC1E3E4A8/",
    material = 3
  }


  -- Destroy existing Hunter Tokens before spawning new ones
  for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
    if obj.hasTag("HunterToken") then
      obj.destroy()
    end
  end

  local hunterToken5 = spawnObject({
    type = "Custom_Model",
    position = token5pos,
    rotation = tokenRot,
    scale = tokenScale
  })
  hunterToken5.setCustomObject(token5params)
  hunterToken5.setName("5")
  hunterToken5.addTag("HunterToken")

  local hunterToken6 = spawnObject({
    type = "Custom_Model",
    position = token6pos,
    rotation = tokenRot,
    scale = tokenScale
  })
  hunterToken6.setCustomObject(token6params)
  hunterToken6.setName("6")
  hunterToken6.addTag("HunterToken")

  local hunterToken7 = spawnObject({
    type = "Custom_Model",
    position = token7pos,
    rotation = tokenRot,
    scale = tokenScale
  })
  hunterToken7.setCustomObject(token7params)
  hunterToken7.setName("7")
  hunterToken7.addTag("HunterToken")

  local hunterToken8 = spawnObject({
    type = "Custom_Model",
    position = token8pos,
    rotation = tokenRot,
    scale = tokenScale
  })
  hunterToken8.setCustomObject(token8params)
  hunterToken8.setName("8")
  hunterToken8.addTag("HunterToken")

  --Count existing Hunters
  local redZone = "102fe0"
  local purpleZone = "28b55f"
  local greenZone = "f5df81"
  local blueZone = "7a7193"
  numPlayers = 0
  redHunter = false
  purpleHunter = false
  greenHunter = false
  blueHunter = false

  local redScriptingZone = getObjectFromGUID(redZone)
  local redObjects = redScriptingZone.getObjects()
  for i, object in ipairs(redObjects) do
    if object.hasTag("HunterBoard") then 
      numPlayers = numPlayers + 1
      redHunter = true
      break
    end
  end

  local purpleScriptingZone = getObjectFromGUID(purpleZone)
  local purpleObjects = purpleScriptingZone.getObjects()
  for i, object in ipairs(purpleObjects) do
    if object.hasTag("HunterBoard") then 
      numPlayers = numPlayers + 1
      purpleHunter = true
      break
    end
  end

  local greenScriptingZone = getObjectFromGUID(greenZone)
  local greenObjects = greenScriptingZone.getObjects()
  for i, object in ipairs(greenObjects) do
    if object.hasTag("HunterBoard") then 
      numPlayers = numPlayers + 1
      greenHunter = true
      break
    end
  end

  local blueScriptingZone = getObjectFromGUID(blueZone)
  local blueObjects = blueScriptingZone.getObjects()
  for i, object in ipairs(blueObjects) do
    if object.hasTag("HunterBoard") then 
      numPlayers = numPlayers + 1
      blueHunter = true
      break
    end
  end

  hunterList = {hunterToken5.guid, hunterToken6.guid, hunterToken7.guid, hunterToken8.guid}
  math.randomseed(os.time()) -- Initialize the random number generator
  shuffleTable(hunterList)
  local tokenMove

  local distribute = 1
  if redHunter then
    tokenMove = getObjectFromGUID(hunterList[distribute])
    tokenMove.setPositionSmooth({28.47, 1.5, -52.39})
    distribute = distribute + 1
  end
  if purpleHunter then
    tokenMove = getObjectFromGUID(hunterList[distribute])
    tokenMove.setPositionSmooth({28.47, 1.5, -17.23})
    distribute = distribute + 1
  end
  if greenHunter then
    tokenMove = getObjectFromGUID(hunterList[distribute])
    tokenMove.setPositionSmooth({28.47, 1.5, 17.90})
    distribute = distribute + 1
  end
  if blueHunter then
    tokenMove = getObjectFromGUID(hunterList[distribute])
    tokenMove.setPositionSmooth({28.47, 1.5, 52.97})
  end
end

function shuffleTable(t)
  for i = #t, 2, -1 do
    local j = math.random(i)
    t[i], t[j] = t[j], t[i]
  end
end

ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Model_Infinite_Bag
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
function setItem(obj)

if obj.hasTag("Board") then 
  myHp = obj.getDescription()
  Global.call("SetHP", myHp)
  obj.setDescription("")
end
if obj.hasTag("Lock") then 
    obj.setLock(true)
end

obj.setGMNotes("") 
end 

function PrepareNewFight(newItem)  

  for _,x in pairs(newItem.getObjects()) do 
  Poslog = x.gm_notes
  SplitPos = Global.call("split", {Poslog,":"}) 
  local pos = self.getPosition()
  local rot = self.getRotation()

  pos.x = tonumber(SplitPos[1])
  pos.y = tonumber(SplitPos[2])
  pos.z = tonumber(SplitPos[3])
  rot.x = tonumber(SplitPos[4])
  rot.y = tonumber(SplitPos[5])
  rot.z = tonumber(SplitPos[6])
 
  newItem.takeObject({guid = x.guid, smooth = false, position = pos, rotation = rot , callback_function = function(obj) setItem(obj) end})
end

newItem.destruct()
    Global.call("PrepareFight", {self.getName(),value})

end
   
function OnLoadClick()
 for x,y in pairs(Global.getObjects()) do 
  if y.hasTag("SaveMe") then 
y.destruct()
  end  
end
  
  for x,y in pairs(getObjectFromGUID("3dd57e").getObjects()) do 
    if not (y.getLock()) then 
      y.destruct()
    end 
  end 
 
self.takeObject({smooth = false, position = {-53,4,-24}, callback_function = function(items) PlaceMe(items) end}) 
end


function PlaceMe(items)
if value >1 then   
  newItem = items.setState(value) 
else 
  newItem = items
end

local myEndN = function() PrepareNewFight(newItem) end
Wait.time( myEndN, 1)
end


function createBtns()
mylabel =  value .. " Star Quest"

self.createButton({
  label=mylabel, click_function="OnLoadClick", function_owner=self,scale = {1,1,0.75},
  position={0,0.6,0.25}, height=90, width=290, font_size=40
}) 

self.createButton({
  label="-", click_function="moins", function_owner=self,scale = {1,1,0.75},
  position={-0.36,0.6,0.25}, height=80, width=80, font_size=64
}) 

self.createButton({
  label="+", click_function="plus", function_owner=self,scale = {1,1,0.75},
  position={0.36,0.6,0.25}, height=80, width=80, font_size=64
})  

end

function moins()
 if value == 2 then
  value = 1
elseif value == 5 then
  value = 2 
end 

updateDisplay()
end


function plus()
if value == 2 then
  value = 5
elseif value == 1 then
  value = 2 
end 

updateDisplay()
end


function onSave()
local data_to_save = {value}
saved_data = JSON.encode(data_to_save)
self.script_state = saved_data
end

function onload(saved_data)
if saved_data ~= "" then
  local loaded_data = JSON.decode(saved_data)

  value = loaded_data[1]
else

  value = 1
end

createBtns()
end

function updateDisplay()
   mylabel =  value .. " Star Quest "

    self.editButton({
  index = 0,
  label = mylabel,
})
end

ContainedObjects.Name: Custom_Assetbundle
ContainedObjects.LuaScript:
function onPickUp()
for _,obj in pairs(Global.getObjects()) do
  if obj.hasTag("starter") then 
obj.destruct()
  end
end
end
